CreateSecurityGroup.name: Security group name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1–65
CreateSecurityGroup.vpcId: VPC ID to which the security group belongs
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.remark: Rule remark (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.direction: Rule direction; values: ingress/egress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.ethertype: Ethernet protocol type (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.portRange: Port range, e.g. 1-65535; empty string means all ports (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.protocol: Protocol type; values: tcp/udp/icmp; empty string means all protocols (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.sourceGroupId: Source security group ID; valid only when direction is ingress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.sourceIp: Source IP address (CIDR format); valid only when direction is ingress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.destGroupId: Destination security group ID; valid only when direction is egress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.destIp: Destination IP address (CIDR format); valid only when direction is egress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.securityGroupId: ID of the security group to which the rule belongs (used in: list security groups)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.securityGroupRuleId: Security group rule ID (used in: list security groups)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.createdTime: Rule creation time (used in: list security groups)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.updatedTime: Rule update time (used in: list security groups)
